headline: Sempra’s Record US$65b Plan And Dividend Raise Test Cash Coverage
summary: Sempra (NYSE:SRE) outlined a record $65b capital plan running through 2030, centered on regulated utility projects in Texas and California. The company paired the long term investment plan with a dividend increase, signaling updated capital allocation priorities. Sempra, trading around $92.63, is putting a clear focus on its core regulated utility operations in two of the largest U.S. energy markets. The stock has gained 38.0% over the past year and 68.7% over five years, which gives useful...
